---
title: "Panel Mixed Measles Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python Import modules}
import os
import pickle
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import pypomp as pp
import jax
from plotnine import *

theme_set(theme_minimal())
```

```{python Runtime}
import datetime
print(datetime.datetime.now())
```

```{python Load data}
PKL_PATH = "gpu_results/panel_measles_results.pkl"
pomp_obj = pickle.load(open(PKL_PATH, "rb"))
```

```{python Prepare frames}
LL_frame = pomp_obj.results()
traces = pomp_obj.traces()

traces_melted = traces.rename(columns={"replicate": "rep", "iteration": "iter"}).melt(
    id_vars=["rep", "iter", "logLik", "method", "unit"],
    var_name="quantity",
    value_name="param_value"
)
traces_melted["rep"] = traces_melted["rep"].astype(str)

last_iter = traces_melted["iter"].max()
best_pfilter = traces_melted[(traces_melted["iter"] == last_iter) & (traces_melted["method"] == "pfilter")]
if not best_pfilter.empty:
    best_rep_val = (
        best_pfilter.groupby("rep")
        ["logLik"].first()
        .sort_values(ascending=False)
        .index[0]
    )
else:
    best_rep_val = traces_melted["rep"].iloc[0]
```

# Python results

## Tables

### Summary
```{python}
print(
    pomp_obj.results(ignore_nan=True)
    .sort_values(by="shared logLik", ascending=False)
    .head()
)
```

```{python}
print(pomp_obj.results(ignore_nan=True)[["unit", "unit logLik"]].groupby("unit").max())
```

### Top results for each method call
```{python}
pomp_obj.print_summary()
```

## Plot traces

### Transformed scale traces

```{python Plot traces}
MAX_UNITS = 3
unique_units = traces_melted["unit"].unique()[:MAX_UNITS]

for unit_val in unique_units:
    unit_data = traces_melted[traces_melted["unit"] == unit_val]
    p = (
        ggplot(unit_data, aes(x="iter", y="param_value", group="rep", color="rep"))
        + geom_line(show_legend=False)
        + facet_wrap("quantity", scales="free")
        + ggtitle(f"Unit: {unit_val}")
        + theme(figure_size=(12, 12))
    )
    p.show()
```

### Natural scale traces
```{python Plot traces (natural scale)}
def logit(x):
    return np.log(x / (1 - x))

traces_pertubation_scale = traces_melted.copy()

log_params = ["R0", "sigma", "gamma", "iota", "sigmaSE", "psi", "S_0", "E_0", "I_0", "R_0"]
logit_params = ["rho", "cohort", "amplitude"]

mask_log = traces_pertubation_scale["quantity"].isin(log_params)
traces_pertubation_scale.loc[mask_log, "param_value"] = np.log(traces_pertubation_scale.loc[mask_log, "param_value"])

mask_logit = traces_pertubation_scale["quantity"].isin(logit_params)
traces_pertubation_scale.loc[mask_logit, "param_value"] = logit(traces_pertubation_scale.loc[mask_logit, "param_value"])

for unit_val in unique_units:
    unit_data = traces_pertubation_scale[traces_pertubation_scale["unit"] == unit_val]
    p = (
        ggplot(unit_data, aes(x="iter", y="param_value", group="rep", color="rep"))
        + geom_line(show_legend=False)
        + facet_wrap("quantity", scales="free")
        + ggtitle(f"Unit (scaled): {unit_val}")
        + theme(figure_size=(12, 12))
    )
    p.show()
```


```{python Final parameter values}
# Violin plots for final pfilter iterations (previously eval = FALSE logic)
# for unit_val in unique_units:
#     unit_data = traces_pertubation_scale[(traces_pertubation_scale["unit"] == unit_val) & (traces_pertubation_scale["method"] == "pfilter")]
#     if not unit_data.empty:
#         p = (
#             ggplot(unit_data, aes(y="param_value", x="quantity"))
#             + geom_violin()
#             + facet_wrap("~quantity", scales="free")
#             + ggtitle(f"Unit Violin: {unit_val}")
#         )
#         print(p)
```


### LogLik traces

```{python Plot LL traces}
for unit_val in unique_units:
    unit_data = traces_melted[traces_melted["unit"] == unit_val]
    ll_data = unit_data[["iter", "rep", "logLik"]].drop_duplicates()
    
    p = (
        ggplot(ll_data, aes(x="iter", y="logLik", group="rep", color="rep"))
        + geom_line(show_legend=False)
        + ggtitle(f"LogLik Traces - Unit: {unit_val}")
        + theme(figure_size=(10, 6))
    )
    p.show()
```
